{{Quote|The famous and sometimes controversial jatz performer Fitz Roi has quite abruptly chosen to transfer his permanent residence from his family's estate on Lenniera to the capital of Esseles, Calamar.|A news report for TriNebulon News by Janna Dixon|<ref name="GNN" />}}
'''Lenniera''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="GNN" /> located in the [[Lenniera system/Legends|Lenniera system]]. It was a part of the [[Arrowhead]], or [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA Lenniera" /> It was the site of the [[Roi's family estate|estate]] of<ref name="GNN" /> the [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]]-old<ref name="Journal4">{{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref> [[Roi's family|family]] of<ref name="GNN" /> the Lennieran<ref name="Slugthrowers" /> [[Jatz/Legends|jatz]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]] [[Fitz Roi]]<ref name="GNN" /> of<ref name="LoE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].<ref name="LoE" /> Three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[1 ABY/Legends|36:4:10]], Roi left his home on Lenniera for an impromptu [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] tour, and eventually he announced his unexpected decision to move his permanent residence to the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Calamar]] on<ref name="GNN" /> the Core [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. On 36:4:10, the musician's decision was noted in a news report by [[Janna Dixon]] for [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]].<ref name="GNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lenniera was introduced by [[Paul Sudlow]] in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|sixth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', which was published in [[May]] [[1995]].<ref name="GNN" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Lenniera [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-10.<ref name="TEA Lenniera" /> The [[January 21]], [[2014]] second installment of the [[StarWars.com]] article "[[Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away]]" by [[Edward M. Erdelac|Ed Erdelac]] misspelled the demonym form of Lenniera's name as "Lenneiran."<ref name="Slugthrowers" />
